title: PE11 3SP, Hook 2 Sisters Limited: environmental permit issued - EPR/YP3532YJ/V003
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:   Operator name: Hook 2 Sisters Limited Installation name: Pinchbeck Poultry Farm Permit number: EPR/YP3532YJ  "
